title: Siena, Tuscany — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Siena, Tuscany: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Siena is a city in Tuscany with a population of 54,000. A medieval Tuscan masterpiece famous for the Palio horse race, stunning Gothic architecture, and a beautifully preserved historic center.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
